title: The Best Times
content:
When Old Folks they wuz young like us
     An' little as you an' me, - 

     Them wuz the best times ever wuz
     Er ever goin' to be!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Whitcomb Riley delivers a powerful performance in "The Best Times"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
